stories.headline: Chinese court awards compensation to sacked worker replaced by AI

stories.headline: Brazil ‘surprised’ by EU ban on meat imports

stories.summary: Europe is expected to source almost two-thirds of its liquefied natural gas imports from the US in 2026, according to a new report by the Institute for Energy Economics and Financial Analysis (IEEFA).

stories.headline: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
